subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant and steadfast in the Testament! With utmost joy thy letter was read, and at the Threshold of the Divine Unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق و راسخ بر عهد بنهایت سرور مکتوب شما قرائت شد و بدرگاه احدیت
subcodes.subjects: @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant
